title: Dynamic Config Foundation - RimWorld-style parameter system
steps: Create config/balance.ts with hierarchical parameter trees
Implement context-aware scaling (load, difficulty, user mastery)
Add config validation with safe ranges

title: Game Balance Parameter Extraction
steps: Extract all hardcoded game balance numbers to config files
Categorize by system: economy, progression, difficulty, performance

title: Adaptive System Thresholds
steps: Replace hardcoded entropy/budget thresholds with adaptive ones
Wire system health into parameter tuning

title: Parameter Modularization Validation
steps: Test all extracted parameters maintain identical behavior
Verify config changes take effect without restart
Add regression tests for balance changes
Validate performance impact of dynamic scaling

title: Balance Analytics & Optimization Engine
steps: Implement A/B testing framework for balance changes
Implement player behavior analysis for tuning

title: Modular Parameter Documentation
steps: Document all configurable parameters with safe ranges
Create troubleshooting guide for parameter issues
